items.name: machine_learning_activities
items.description: Machine Learning assignments and experiments including data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, optimization, and explainability techniques using Python and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: ms-xai-classifier
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning framework for Multiple Sclerosis (MS) subtype classification (RRMS, SPMS, PPMS) using clinical and MRI-derived features, integrating SHAP-based interpretability and counterfactual explanations for actionable insights.

items.name: Nested-Cross-Validation-Framework-for-Machine-Learning--Plant-Leaf-Classification-Journal
items.description: A robust machine learning framework for plant leaf classification using nested cross-validation, feature extraction, and comparative model evaluation to ensure reliable and unbiased performance analysis.

items.name: ml-docker-scanner
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning framework for Docker image security assessment and pre-deployment protection in cloud environments.

items.name: waterseek
items.description: WaterSeek is a lightweight framework that uses large language models to extract structured data from electrochemical water treatment literature, enabling standardized databases, machine learning modeling, and interpretable analysis of degradation kinetics.

items.name: AI-Project
items.description: The project features a user-friendly web interface developed using the Django framework, allowing users to monitor, analyze, and manage potential threats seamlessly. By integrating machine learning with a webbased platform, This will enhances threat visibility, supports informed decision making, and contributes to a more secure digital environment.

items.name: tabular-experiments
items.description: Experiment framework for tabular machine learning with augmentation and multi-model support.

items.name: infectious-disease-xai
items.description: summer 2026 project that develops an interpretable AI framework for predicting infectious disease spread, combining stochastic epidemiological modelling with explainable machine learning. focusing on diseases like tuberculosis, monkeypox, and COVID-19 variants, it aims to support transparent outbreak forecasting and early public health response.

items.name: A-Hybrid-Ensemble-Learning-Framework-For-Multi-Disease-Prediction-
items.description: An AI-powered diagnostic platform that utilizes an optimized machine learning framework and an asynchronous Flask backend to deliver real-time, zero-refresh predictive risk assessments for five critical health conditions.

items.name: tvm
items.description: Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework

items.name: A-Unified-CNN-Vision-Transformer-Framework-for-Deepfake-Detection
items.description: Understanding of deep learning concepts such as Convolutional Neural Networks and Vision Transformer architectures. Knowledge of image preprocessing, feature extraction, and attention mechanisms for detecting manipulated media. Experience working with deepfake datasets and training/testing machine learning models.

items.name: ifi-msc-pipeline
items.description: Small Patients, Sparse Events: An End-to-End Framework for Machine Learning for Pediatric Sleep Apnea Detection

items.name: ifi-msc-classifier
items.description: Small Patients, Sparse Events: An End-to-End Framework for Machine Learning for Pediatric Sleep Apnea Detection

items.name: Bias-Aware-and-Explainable-Ai-framwework-for-Automated-Resume-Screening-System-2210990008-
items.description: A Bias-Aware and Explainable AI framework for automated resume screening using Machine Learning and NLP techniques. The system improves recruitment efficiency, reduces bias in candidate evaluation, and provides transparent prediction analysis using Explainable AI.

items.name: Feature-Importance-XAI-Project
items.description: This project provides a comprehensive framework for feature importance visualization and analysis in machine learning models. It implements multiple state-of-the-art methods for global interpretability including permutation importance, SHAP, SAGE, and stability analysis.

items.name: AI-Transparency-Tools
items.description: A comprehensive Explainable AI (XAI) toolkit focused on post-hoc global and local explanations for machine learning models. This project provides state-of-the-art interpretability methods with proper evaluation frameworks and interactive demonstrations.

items.name: Red-Teaming-for-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for adversarial robustness testing and red teaming of machine learning models. This project implements various adversarial attacks, robustness evaluation metrics, and visualization tools to assess the security and reliability of AI systems.

items.name: Decision-Tree-Extraction-from-Black-Box-Models
items.description: Comprehensive framework for extracting interpretable decision trees from black-box machine learning models. This project focuses on **post-hoc local/global interpretability** through **rule/tree extraction** methods.

items.name: Model-Behavioral-Testing-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive framework for model behavioral testing that evaluates machine learning models across various scenarios, edge cases, and adversarial conditions. This project focuses on trust and safety aspects of AI systems through systematic behavioral evaluation.

items.name: Bias-Detection-in-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for detecting and assessing bias in machine learning models, designed for research and educational purposes.

items.name: credit-portfolio-risk-optimization
items.description: An end-to-end analytics framework for retail credit decisioning that balances risk and profitability. It combines machine learning, financial metrics, and policy simulation to maximize expected portfolio value under risk constraints, reflecting real-world challenges faced by senior banking analytics teams.

items.name: automated-model-monitoring-drift-detection
items.description: End-to-end monitoring framework that tracks machine learning model performance in production, detects data and concept drift using statistical tests, and surfaces alerts when model retraining is required.

items.name: GRB-ML
items.description: Machine Learning-based framework for redshift estimation and cosmological parameter inference using Gamma-Ray Bursts as potential standard candles.

items.name: Paktron-Version-4.0.1
items.description: PKTron 4.0.1: 150+ Quantum Classes, 13 Simulation Backends (Statevector, MPS, PEPS, Clifford), HPC GPU-Distributed Runtime, Tensor Networks, QAOA, VQE, Shor, Grover, Quantum Machine Learning, QKD Cryptography, Surface Code Error Correction, Quantum Finance, and Full OpenQASM 3 Interoperability in One Unified Framework

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: photo_attendance
items.description: Machine Learning based photo attendance framework

items.name: dsr-feature-eng-ml
items.description: Machine learning model evaluation and feature engineering framework with hyperparameter tuning, data balancing, and feature importance analysis.

items.name: Thesis-Explainable-AI-for-Industrial-Gear-Fault-Detection
items.description: This thesis presents an explainable AI framework for predictive maintenance  in industrial gear systems. We develop a multi-model machine learning pipeline  integrating Gradient Boosting, XGBoost, Random Forest, SVM, and Logistic  Regression with advanced explainability techniques (SHAP and LIME).

items.name: sql-backup-intelligence
items.description: AI-driven SQL Server backup monitoring framework for anomaly detection, SLA risk analysis, Predictive Failure Risk and operational telemetry insights using Python and machine learning

items.name: bristol-ml
items.description: Framework code to discuss, design and implement in Bristol Machine Learning and Data Science meetups

items.name: career-guidance-backend
items.description: AI-powered career guidance system built with Django REST Framework and machine learning.

items.name: phishing-detector
items.description: A Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for Detecting Phishing Attacks in Web Traffic

items.name: AgML
items.description: AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.

items.name: macrolab-site
items.description: Framework modular de inteligência preditiva para análise de sustentabilidade fiscal e risco soberano. Integra modelos de Machine Learning (Random Forest) e econometria avançada (SPJ) com dados em tempo real da FRED e BCB. Base técnica da tese de Éuriks Souza Davalo

items.name: financial-distress-prediction-imbalance-aware
items.description: Imbalance-aware machine learning framework for enterprise financial distress prediction using ensemble learning, SMOTE oversampling, and SHAP explainability analysis.

items.name: Heart-Disease-Classification-Analysis
items.description: This Machine Learning project presents a rigorous, leakage-aware hybrid soft-voting ensemble framework combining k-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Random Forest (RF) for heart disease prediction on the UCI Cleveland dataset.

items.name: Early-prediction-framework-for-arthritis-using-machine-learning-algorithm
items.description: Machine learning project for predicting arthritis risk levels using CatBoost, XGBoost, and healthcare datasets

items.name: music-energy-prediction-research-project
items.description: Developed a machine learning model to predict music energy from psychographic data using Scikit-Learn, achieving 82.14% accuracy and an 0.85 ROC-AUC score with an optimized Random Forest classifier, validated by a custom overfitting framework.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Framework-for-the-Detection-of-Mental-Stress-main
items.description: A real-time Face Emotion Recognition (FER) system that uses a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model to detect mental stress levels during online learning environments. The system captures emotional cues from facial expressions to determine stress, enhancing digital mental health monitoring.

items.name: sleep-quality-prediction-research-project
items.description: Developed a machine learning model to predict sleep quality from lifestyle data using Scikit-Learn, achieving 85.19% accuracy and an 0.88 ROC-AUC score with an optimized Random Forest classifier, validated by a custom overfitting framework.

items.name: CHURNGUARD
items.description: A machine learning framework for predicting customer attrition in telecommunication.

items.name: ebma-icu-readmission
items.description: Ensemble Bayesian Model Averaging (EBMA)-based framework combining 25 deep learning, machine learning, and clinical scoring models for 30-day ICU readmission prediction on MIMIC-III.

items.name: CardioTwin-AI-of-your-heart
items.description: CardioTwin AI is a personalized digital twin framework designed for predictive cardiac health and diagnostic optimization. It integrates a 3D heart model developed in Blender with data-driven machine learning to visualize and analyze heart health. The platform features an AI-powered chatbot within a custom user interface.

items.name: QRC-Volatility-Forecasting
items.description: A Python framework for volatility forecasting using Quantum Reservoir Computing (Qiskit) and GARCH (Arch). Benchmarks quantum machine learning against econometric baselines on S&P 500 data.

items.name: urban-sprawl-monitoring-gee-ml
items.description: AI-powered urban sprawl monitoring and 2030 prediction framework using GHSL, Sentinel-2, Google Earth Engine, and Machine Learning for Chennai, Hyderabad, and Bengaluru.

items.name: MitoVeritas
items.description: A machine learning framework for accurate low-frequency mtDNA mutation detection by identifying and removing NUMT-derived artifacts. Integrates DNA-RNA dual-omics and multi-dimensional features to robustly distinguish genuine mitochondrial mutations from nuclear mitochondrial DNA segments (NUMTs) contamination.

items.name: Blockchain-forensics-for-pig-butchering-scam-2210992075-
items.description: A machine learning-based framework that analyzes Ethereum transaction data to identify suspicious wallet addresses linked to pig butchering scams. The system uses feature extraction and a Random Forest classifier to detect high-risk wallets based on transaction behavior patterns, enabling efficient fraud detection and blockchain investigation.

items.name: DiaPipeline-A-Production-Ready-ML-Framework
items.description: A production-ready Machine Learning pipeline for Diabetes prediction. This project demonstrates advanced software engineering practices in ML, featuring custom Scikit-Learn transformers, modular architecture, automated outlier handling, and hyperparameter tuning using GridSearchCV.

items.name: dml-keyword-intent-measurement
items.description: Double Machine Learning framework for correcting selection bias in keyword-level advertising measurement and incrementality estimation.

items.name: An-Hybrid-ensemble-learning-for-multidisease-prediction-system
items.description: A Hybrid Ensemble Learning Framework designed to predict multiple diseases using integrated machine learning algorithms like SVM, Random Forest, and Logistic Regression.

items.description: This project presents an AI-driven Audit & Fraud Detection framework designed to identify suspicious financial transactions within a highly imbalanced dataset. The system combines Machine Learning with Explainable AI (XAI) techniques to deliver accurate, transparent, and auditable risk predictions.

items.name: LEAF-Locust-Early-Alert-Framework
items.description: LEAF (Locust Early Alert Framework) is an AI-powered agricultural monitoring system designed to predict and visualize locust outbreak risks using machine learning and real-time environmental insights. The platform provides interactive dashboards, risk analytics, and smart alert support for farmers and government authorities.

items.description: Secure Federated Learning Framework for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is a privacy-preserving and attack-resilient distributed learning framework designed for collaborative intelligence in UAV networks. The framework enables multiple UAVs to train shared machine learning models without exchanging raw data.

items.description: "Project ChurnGuard is a strategic predictive analytics solution developed to mitigate customer attrition in a high-volume database of 11,260 active accounts. Facing a baseline 16.84% churn rate and to build a robust machine learning framework to transit business operation to proactive retention rather than reactive measures.

items.name: Hybrid_malware_detection_framework
items.description: AI-powered Hybrid Malware Detection Framework that combines static and dynamic analysis with machine learning to detect and classify malicious software. The system analyzes file behavior, API calls, and runtime activities to identify cyber threats with improved accuracy and reduced false positives.

items.description: 🚀Live, multi-source sports event intelligence platform engineered with distributed, low-latency architecture that delivers real-time AI-generated commentary, predictive analytics, and context-aware insights. It leverages advanced machine learning pipelines, natural language generation(NLG) and stream processing frameworks to provide dynamic play.

items.description: Machine learning-based student dropout prediction framework comparing global (Kaggle) and local (Bangladesh) datasets. Includes feature engineering, SHAP-based explainability, ensemble models, and an early-warning system for academic interventions.

items.name: quantum

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval
items.description: Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.name: mexico-hypertension-risk-prediction
items.description: Machine Learning framework to identify hypertension risk factors in the Mexican population using ENSANUT 2022 biometric data.

items.name: MACLAS
items.description: MACLAS stands for Mineral Archaeological CLASsification. A machine-learning based framework for mineral classification of personal adornment objects. It is a complementary material to the paper "A supervised multiclass framework for mineral classification of Iberian beads".

items.name: Aegis-Ai
items.description: Aegis AI is an intelligent, automated security framework designed to provide a proactive shield against modern cyber threats. By leveraging machine learning models, Aegis AI analyzes network traffic in real-time to detect anomalies, mitigate DDoS attacks, and identify potential vulnerabilities before they can be exploited.
